category_note: News Corp spans Direct Digital (publisher buys, home page buy-outs, native), Print (newspaper mastheads), and BVOD via partner deals. Confirm which arm per line item.
source: STUB ENTRY — News Corp's digital media assets page (https://www.newscorpaustralia.com/media-assets/digital-media-assets/) is a JavaScript SPA that doesn't respond to web_fetch. When a News Corp line item appears, ask the planner to download the relevant spec PDF and supply it.

known_format_families.fallback_specs: Use Assembled Programmatic standard display specs as a starting point — confirm with News Corp per booking

known_format_families.notes: Always custom-spec per masthead and execution — confirm with News Corp account manager

known_format_families.fallback_specs: Use Assembled Programmatic native specs as starting point

known_format_families.notes: Print specs vary by masthead, section, and edition. Confirm masthead and placement before resolving specs.
Use BVOD specs at 3000 kbps bit rate. Confirm if Kayo or broader Foxtel.

refresh_instructions: Download the latest spec PDF from the News Corp media assets page
Run pdftotext -layout on the downloaded PDF
Use scripts/save_to_library.py to add structured spec records
Update last_refreshed date and remove stub_status
